name: tool_node_ops
description: Perform runtime operations on a NuCore node (enable, disable, delete, move, rename, etc.)

operation.description: The operation to perform on the node.

node_id.description: The node ID from NODES RUNTIME DATA. Must match the 'id' field exactly. (required for all operations except 'add_group' and 'add_folder')

new_name.description: The new name for the node (required for `add_group`, `add_folder`, and `rename` operations).

new_parent_id.description: The new parent ID for the node (required for `move` operation).
